column3:
• Premium Glass Jar: Made from high-quality, food-grade glass, perfect for sprouting a variety of seeds like mung beans, chickpeas, and more.
    • Durable Perforated Lid: Rust-free and BPA-free lid with precision holes for easy rinsing and ventilation, ensuring optimal sprouting conditions.
    • Step-by-Step Manual Included: Detailed instructions to guide beginners and experts alike in creating nutrient-packed sprouts effortlessly.
    • Eco-Friendly & Reusable: Say goodbye to single-use plastics with this sustainable, reusable kit.
    • Compact & Versatile: Ideal for home kitchens, healthy meal prep, and sprouting enthusiasts.

 

  • What’s in the Box?

    1. 700 ml Glass Jar
    2. Perforated Sprout Lid
    3. Instruction Manual
